author: claude
content: Socket-reliability Phase 2 (relevant to the StorageController liveness/forward-progress investigation flagged 00:17): audited all 41 distinct wait/sleep/timeout/join sites in openwpm/ -> 28 KEEP (genuine hung-resource deadlines), 5 REPLACE wait-and-hope sites wireable to a real completion signal over the bidi socket chain, 4 MAYBE. Phase-3 fan-out = 5 workers (R1 Finalize-ack drain is the flagship; R2 deletes the #135 time.sleep(2) stopgap once R1 lands; R4 is the instrument-status signal-back). Full worklist in datadir/timeout-audit.md.
